text:
お帰りなさい！
目標の達成、確認しました！

司令にも、十全で完全無欠で
パーフェクトな結果だったと
伝えておきます！

<%me>さんの
活躍もあって、ヒーローを目指す
アークスは着実に増えてます！

ありがとうございます！
本当に、ありがとうございますっ！

今後とも、ヒーローのクラスを
よろしく

Welcome back!
SOMEONE looks like they've completed
the test!

I'll inform HQ that your results were perfectly
flawless across the board!

The more great stuff you accomplish, the more
operatives we see trying to become Heroes!
You're amazing, <%me>!
I really, REALLY can't thank you enough!

I hope that you'll stick with the Hero class,
and give people someone to look up to!
